case_title: 172 PALM LLC VS. VERTEX PROPERTY GROUP

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF 172 PALM LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT VERTEX PROPERTY GROUP

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-27-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-27-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF 172 PALM LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY RON THAYER, SOLE MEMBER. DEFENDANT STEPHEN WASSERMAN IS PRESENT PRINCIPAL OF VERTEX. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (SEE SIGNATURE) SERVED OCT-13-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VERTEX PROPERTY GROUP
(SC-108) REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL THE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 172 PALM LLC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY 172 PALM LLC AS TO DEFENDANT VERTEX PROPERTY GROUP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-27-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 172 PALM LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VERTEX PROPERTY GROUP $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,065.00, THE DUTY OF A PROPERTY MANAGER IS TO MAINTAIN THE PROPERTY. AFTER THE FEBRUARY 2018 BILL DEFENDANT SHOULD HAVE INQUIRED ABOUT WATER USE. BUT I OFFSET PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES BY THE $4000 THAT DEFENDANT ALREADY OFFERED (IN THE FORM OF WAIVING THE RIGHT TO RENT) TO PLAINTIFF TO OFFSET THE WATER BILL ISSUE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF 172 PALM LLC
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF 172 PALM LLC AS TO DEFENDANT VERTEX PROPERTY GROUP
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-27-2018 - JUDGMENT.

ORDER DENYING REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT (SC-108): PLAINTIFF HAS PRESENTED INSUFFICIENT EVIDENCE THAT THE PURPORTED SETTLEMENT IS UNRELATED, AND IN ANY EVENT THE COURT VIEWED THE NEGLIGENCE HERE AS A CLOSE CASE.
ANSWER TO REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT (RECEIVED UNTIMELY BY THE COURT, AFTER SC-108 ORDER ENTERED) FILED BY DEFENDANT VERTEX PROPERTY GROUP
